summary: Consumption-First Viral Loop (Phase 0-2) testing completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all consumption-first changes: Hero CTAs (Watch Now primary, Make Your Version secondary, Create Later tertiary), card CTA labels (Watch Now/Continue watching/Watch Story), card click navigation to /app/story-viewer/{jobId}, floating Create CTA appears after 50% scroll, Watch Page engagement row (Like/Save/Share), Make Your Version CTA, Next Episode CTA, remix chain section with 'People also remixed this into'. No 'Create your version' text found anywhere (correct).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js (lines 339-342): Card CTA labels correctly implement Watch-first hierarchy - 'Watch Now' for TRENDING/FRESH, 'Continue watching' for CONTINUE, 'Watch Story' for UNFINISHED
Dashboard.js (lines 319-335): Card click handler correctly routes to /app/story-viewer/{jobId} for real stories, studio for seed cards
Dashboard.js (lines 168-208): Hero section correctly implements 3-tier CTA: Watch Now (primary gradient), Make Your Version (secondary outline), Create Later (tertiary text)
Dashboard.js (lines 927-940): Floating Create CTA correctly appears only after 50% scroll depth via IntersectionObserver
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 309-345): Engagement row correctly implements Like, Save, Share buttons with data-testid attributes
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 416-434): 'Make Your Version' CTA (not 'Remix') correctly implemented in body section
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 392-414): Next Episode CTA is big primary violet gradient button as specified
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 436-465): Remix chain section correctly shows 'People also remixed this into' heading
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 259-277): Auto-play countdown overlay with cancel button correctly implemented
StoryViewerPage.jsx (lines 228-237): Video tracking fires watch_completed_50 at 50% and watch_completed_100 at end

funnel_tracking.py (lines 53-68): FUNNEL_STEPS correctly includes all Phase 0 events: story_viewed, story_card_clicked, watch_started, watch_completed_50, watch_completed_100, cta_clicked, remix_clicked, scroll_depth_50
seed_data_creation: None - used existing battle-demo-root story data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Consumption-First Viral Loop (Phase 0-2) fully implemented and tested. Key changes verified: (1) Hero CTAs: Watch Now (primary), Make Your Version (secondary), Create Later (tertiary). (2) Card CTAs: 'Watch Now' for TRENDING/FRESH/NEW, 'Continue watching' for CONTINUE, 'Watch Story' for UNFINISHED - NO 'Create your version' anywhere. (3) Card clicks navigate to /app/story-viewer/{jobId} for real stories, studio for seed cards. (4) Floating Create CTA appears only after 50% scroll depth. (5) Watch Page has engagement row (Like/Save/Share), 'Make Your Version' CTA (not Remix), big Next Episode CTA, remix chain section with 'People also remixed this into', auto-play countdown overlay. (6) Funnel tracking accepts all Phase 0 events: story_viewed, story_card_clicked, watch_started, watch_completed_50, watch_completed_100, cta_clicked. (7) Video tracking fires watch_completed_50 at 50% progress and watch_completed_100 when video ends.

backend_tests_summary.TestFunnelTrackingEndpoint: 9 tests passed - story_viewed, story_card_clicked, watch_started, watch_completed_50, watch_completed_100, cta_clicked, remix_clicked, scroll_depth_50, invalid step rejection
backend_tests_summary.TestStoryViewerEndpoint: 3 tests passed - returns story data, chain info, 404 for invalid ID
backend_tests_summary.TestStoryFeedEndpoint: 2 tests passed - returns rows, stories have required fields
backend_tests_summary.TestIncrementMetricEndpoint: 2 tests passed - views and shares increment

feature_implementation_verified.Hero CTAs: Verified - Watch Now (primary), Make Your Version (secondary), Create Later (tertiary)
feature_implementation_verified.Card CTA labels: Verified - Watch Now/Continue watching/Watch Story, NO 'Create your version'
feature_implementation_verified.Card click navigation: Verified - navigates to /app/story-viewer/{jobId} for real stories
feature_implementation_verified.Floating Create CTA: Verified - appears only after 50% scroll depth
feature_implementation_verified.Watch Page engagement row: Verified - Like, Save, Share buttons present
feature_implementation_verified.Watch Page Next Episode CTA: Verified - big primary violet gradient button
feature_implementation_verified.Watch Page remix chain: Verified - 'People also remixed this into' section
feature_implementation_verified.Watch Page auto-play: Verified - countdown overlay with cancel button exists
feature_implementation_verified.Funnel tracking events: Verified - all Phase 0 events accepted by POST /api/funnel/track
feature_implementation_verified.Video tracking: Verified - watch_completed_50 and watch_completed_100 events tracked
